title: Gallery placeholder/preview lost on Stop-driven loop re-fire (ordering race)
description:
ROOT FOUND 2026-07-08 (post-repro-gate): NOT an event-ordering race in the gallery handlers at all. The gallery PromptBox Stop handler (MpiGalleryBlock.js pb.on('cancel')) calls cancelRunningCueJob() — which runs the armed-loop re-fire SYNCHRONOUSLY inside it (new gen started + placeholder correctly mounted via generation:cancelled → _rebuildAfterEnd) — and THEN unconditionally ran grid.el.setGroups(_visibleProjectGroups()) with NO placeholders, WIPING the just-mounted placeholder. Deterministic last-write wipe, not a race. Explains everything: card invisible whole run; previews fired but grid.updatePreview no-ops (tempId not in _cardMap = the old 'inCardMap=FALSE' decisive log); card pops only at finish; all 6 MPI-226 point-fixes failed because they patched the lifecycle handlers while the wipe came AFTER them from the Stop handler. FIX SHIPPED: Stop handler now reconciles — setGroups([..._placeholdersForFirst(), ...currentGroups]). One line + comment. Status-bar blindness user reported in repro-gate: code-walk says bar should live (tool:running(NEW) latches during re-fire; OLD's id-tagged tool:cancelled ignored once latched); VERIFY in retest — if bar still blind it is a separate defect to chase (candidates: reconcile self-heal window before store register of re-fired job). Repro-gate result 2026-07-08: N/M sane (status-bar tqdm-bleed twin GONE with MPI-226 double-fire fix); placeholder/preview invisibility confirmed at all 3 Stop timings (deterministic).

=== ORIGINAL CARD (superseded analysis) ===
Split from MPI-226. When the user presses Stop during an armed loop, the re-fired next generation runs (backend + eventually a finished card) but its LIVE placeholder card + streaming preview latents + status-bar N/M progress do NOT appear until it finishes. The gen after that one displays correctly. INVESTIGATION-FIRST — do NOT patch blind (MPI-226 burned 6 attempts on this).

=== RE-EVALUATED 2026-07-08 (plan.md SUPERSEDES the analysis below) ===
All evidence below (the decisive inCardMap=FALSE log, the 6 failed point-fixes) was gathered while the MPI-226 DOUBLE-FIRE was still live (2-3 overlapping gens per Stop). The guard + gallery revert were NEVER re-tested together — the symptom may already be dead. Code-walk: original gallery code self-heals under a single re-fire (cancelled(OLD) always fires after the sync window; _rebuildAfterEnd promotes NEW). PLAN: Phase 0 repro gate (user, 3 Stops) → clean = close as subsumed by the double-fire fix; still broken = 1-line registry-order fix (set entry.status='cancelled' BEFORE exec.cancel() in activeGenerations.cancel — kills the stale-'running' window at the source for ALL consumers); reconcile rewrite = LAST resort only, and it must KEEP first-running semantics (mounting all running gens changes queue-mode UX = product question, not a bug fix). CORRECTION to status-bar note below: 'add prompt_id filter to SSE step frames' is NOT implementable — frames are parsed from stdout tqdm (no prompt id); implementable variant = gate step consumption until WS says OUR prompt_id is executing (serial execution makes this exact). COMMIT HAZARD: HEAD (d4a528f) accidentally contains the MPI-226 instrumented failed-fix in MpiGalleryBlock.js — the uncommitted working-tree revert MUST be committed or the failed experiment ships.
=== ORIGINAL ANALYSIS (double-fire-era evidence, kept for reference) ===

ROOT (proven by instrumented logs, 2026-07-08): the gallery's placeholder-visibility model is coupled to `_firstRunningEntry()` (js/components/Blocks/MpiGalleryBlock/MpiGalleryBlock.js — `_placeholdersForFirst`, the `generation:started`/`generation:preview`/`_rebuildAfterEnd` handlers). During a Stop, `activeGenerations.cancel()` runs the store cancel SYNCHRONOUSLY, which fires the loop callback → `_onLaneDrain` → re-fire → new `activeGenerations.start()` + `generation:started(NEW)` — ALL before the OLD entry is marked `cancelled`/removed (activeGenerations.js:122-125). So for a synchronous window BOTH old and new entries are status:'running', old is insertion-order-first. The decisive log fact: for the Stop-refired gen, `grid.updatePreview tempId=<new> inCardMap=FALSE` for the ENTIRE run — its placeholder was never (or was mounted-then-immediately-wiped) in the grid `_cardMap`. `_rebuildAfterEnd` (fired on the OLD cancelled) races the NEW gen's own `started` mount and the ordering drops the NEW placeholder. The gen AFTER gets a clean `_rebuildAfterEnd` with `livePh` including it, so it shows.

THE FRAGILITY: every attempted point-fix (trust payload placeholder; queue-guard on first-running; always-mount; remove first-running from _rebuildAfterEnd; paint-by-own-tempIds) fixed one ordering permutation and exposed another. The real fix is almost certainly a REWRITE to an idempotent reconcile: on ANY gen lifecycle event, mounted placeholders = { all currently-owned status:'running' gens' placeholderGroup+extraPlaceholders }, computed from activeGenerations, with NO reliance on event ordering or a single 'first-running' owner. Grid `_rerenderJustified` is debounced 16ms and reuses cards by group.id (MpiGalleryGrid.js:1329 _getCardEntry) — reconcile must be safe under that.

STATUS-BAR TWIN: the 'N/M shows wrong max (5/5 for a 2-step SDXL)' symptom is the SAME root — overlapping gens' tqdm bars bleed into one tracker. commandExecutor.js stageProgress is per-gen (closure-local) but the SSE `/comfy/events/stream` frames carry NO prompt_id/gen_id filter (only engine), so a doomed gen's still-draining bars feed the re-fired gen's tracker; phaseProgress.js self-correct `if(_stage>_total)_total=_stage` then climbs → inflated max. Fixing the double-fire (MPI-226, shipped) removes MOST overlap; if 5/5 still recurs after that, add a gen-id/prompt-id filter to the SSE step-progress consumer (commandExecutor.js ~1346-1460) OR reset the tracker on a new-prompt boundary. Full map in research/.

NOT A DATA BUG: the gen completes and saves correctly; this is display-only. Lower severity than the shipped MPI-226 fixes.
shipped: FIX 1 — MpiGalleryBlock.js pb.on('cancel'): Stop handler now reconciles placeholders (setGroups([..._placeholdersForFirst(), ...currentGroups])) instead of wiping the re-fired gen's just-mounted placeholder. USER-VERIFIED all 3 Stop timings.

FIX 2 — statusBar.js _reconcileFromStore: re-arm when a live store job exists but the bar is idle ((genId !== _activeGenId || _state !== 'active')) — cures stuck-IDLE on the re-fired run. genId!==null guard preserved. USER-VERIFIED.
verify_checklist: Arm Loop, Stop mid-gen x3 (early/mid/late) -> re-fired gen shows placeholder card immediately + latents stream on it. [DONE — user verified 2026-07-08, all timings]
Same test: status bar shows label/progress for the re-fired gen. [DONE — user verified 2026-07-09]
N/M stage counter stays sane (already verified sane in repro-gate 2026-07-08). [DONE]
Plain Stop with loop OFF still clears placeholders (no ghost placeholder). [DONE — covered by user 'verified' close-out]
Normal gen completes -> completion flash + 'Generation finished' toast still play (no idle-stomp regression from reconcile re-arm). [DONE — covered by user 'verified' close-out]
